sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO C_YZD_MESSENGER_T (companyid,personname,sexes,education,cardnumber,nation,telephone,homeplace,lifeplace, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($companyid$,'$personname$','$sexes$','$education$','$cardnumber$','$nation$','$telephone$','$homeplace$','$lifeplace$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM C_YZD_MESSENGER_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0
companyid = $companyid$
(personname like '%$personname$%')
cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
telephone = '$telephone$'
sexes = '$sexes$'
education = '$education$'
nation = '$nation$'

SELECT * FROM C_YZD_MESSENGER_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0
companyid = $companyid$
(personname like '%$personname$%')
cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
telephone = '$telephone$'
sexes = '$sexes$'
education = '$education$'
nation = '$nation$'
ORDER BY ID
SELECT * FROM C_YZD_MESSENGER_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0 AND id = $id$
sqlMap.update: update c_yzd_messenger_t set personname = '$personname$',sexes='$sexes$',education='$education$', cardnumber='$cardnumber$',nation='$nation$',telephone='$telephone$',homeplace='$homeplace$', lifeplace='$lifeplace$',updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$',companyid = $companyid$ where id = $id$
UPDATE C_YZD_MESSENGER_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0 WHERE id = $id$
